# SBDC Resource Partner Process Overview

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## What an SBDC is in the BOSS ecosystem ## Standard SBDC process 1. User identifies their location and business need.

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns business planning, certification, ecosystem navigation during Validation and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- ## What an SBDC is in the BOSS ecosystem
- ## Standard SBDC process
- User identifies their location and business need.
- User finds the local SBDC by ZIP/county/service area.
- New user completes the SBDC intake/registration process.
- SBDC schedules virtual or in-person advising.
- Advisor helps with planning, market research, financing preparation, management, marketing, training, and local ecosystem navigation.

## People and links

- Organizations: U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA), Small Business Development Center (SBDC), University of Houston
- Link: <https://www.sba.gov/local-assistance>

## Next handoff

Open the cited source link when available and route follow-up to U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) or the named qualified resource.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
